invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破138（基于ATR 1.0254和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score降至50%以下（显示多头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 138 (based on ATR 1.0254 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score falls below 50% (indicating long pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.132（基于ATR 0.0011和近期低点）或融资费率Z-Score降至50%以下（显示多头压力增加），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.132 (based on ATR 0.0011 and recent lows) or funding rate Z-Score falls below 50% (indicating increased long pressure).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破880（基于ATR 4.1275和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score升至-50%以上（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 880 (based on ATR 4.1275 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -50% (indicating short pressure easing).
